title: Races & Classes
description: A sort-of balanced, fantasy- and RPG-themed Origins modpack.
body:
**WIP** Forge your own path in an expansive open world, rife with new structures, loot, and challenges.
Features • Expansive list of fantasy and RPG themed Origins
• List of RPG-themed classes (Origins Classes)
• Skill tree with assorted paths to choose from
• Wealth of Magical tomes to choose from for real spells
• Expansive world, with overhauled and new: biomes, structures, and even whole dimensions
• Tons of new items, trinkets, weapons and mechanics
• Some litle QOL and Vanilla+-ness
### Disclaimers • We are 2 school-going teenagers, so forgive us if we are slow with updating and responding to issues
